issues.description: Card text says 'You may trash 2 cards' — this is a conditional optional action with a specific count (2), not an unconditional trash. DSL must use a condition or cost structure to represent 'may trash exactly 2 cards' before triggering the effect.
'filter' should specify card type constraints if any; 'Any' is acceptable but the structure should clarify this is a cost condition, not a simple action.
The 'thenActions' structure is correct in concept, but the cost (trash 2) must be explicitly optional ('may') and counted. Current DSL doesn't enforce the '2 cards' requirement.
